goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'cambridge' and should depart from 'bishops stortford'.
The train should leave on 'wednesday' and should 'leave after 11:15'.
Make sure you get 'arrival time'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should 'include free wifi' and should have 'a star of 0'.
The hotel should be in the 'moderate' price range and should be in the 'centre'.
Make sure you get 'phone number', 'hotel type', and 'whether they have free parking'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should go to cambridge and should depart from bishops stortford
The train should leave on wednesday and should leave after 11:15
Make sure you get arrival time
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should include free wifi and should have a star of 0
The hotel should be in the moderate price range and should be in the centre
Make sure you get phone number, hotel type, and whether they have free parking
